title: Visiting on business :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Visiting on business
Learn about coming to New Zealand on business or applying for an Asia-Pacific Economic Cooperation (APEC) Business Travel Card. Find out how to get approval for your arts or music festival to make it easy for performers and staff to come to New Zealand.
- Visiting New Zealand on business If you are planning to visit New Zealand on business, check to see if you need a visa or a New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority (NZeTA).

## Visiting New Zealand on business
If you are planning to visit New Zealand on business, check to see if you need a visa or a New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority (NZeTA).
- APEC Business Travel Card to visit New Zealand If you have an APEC Business Travel Card (ABTC), you can visit New Zealand for up to 3 months at a time to carry out trade and investment activities. New Zealand needs to be listed on your card as an economy that has pre-cleared you for short-term business travel here.

## APEC Business Travel Card to visit New Zealand
If you have an APEC Business Travel Card (ABTC), you can visit New Zealand for up to 3 months at a time to carry out trade and investment activities. New Zealand needs to be listed on your card as an economy that has pre-cleared you for short-term business travel here.
- APEC Business Travel Card (ABTC) and Virtual ABTC for New Zealanders If you are a New Zealander and have an APEC Business Travel Card (ABTC), you can visit participating APEC economies at short notice to carry out trade and investment activities. You can only travel to the economies listed on your card, that have pre-cleared you for business travel there.

## APEC Business Travel Card (ABTC) and Virtual ABTC for New Zealanders
If you are a New Zealander and have an APEC Business Travel Card (ABTC), you can visit participating APEC economies at short notice to carry out trade and investment activities. You can only travel to the economies listed on your card, that have pre-cleared you for business travel there.
- Approval for festivals and entertainment promoters Festival and entertainment organisers can get approval to bring their performers and staff to New Zealand on Visitor Visas.

## Approval for festivals and entertainment promoters
Festival and entertainment organisers can get approval to bring their performers and staff to New Zealand on Visitor Visas.
- Visa guidance for performers and support staff Performers and support staff for festivals or entertainment acts must apply for a NZeTA (New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority) or a specific visitor visa to travel to New Zealand.

## Visa guidance for performers and support staff
Performers and support staff for festivals or entertainment acts must apply for a NZeTA (New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority) or a specific visitor visa to travel to New Zealand.
